positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, featuring stylized silhouettes of various trees and organic shapes arranged in a symmetrical, repeating pattern. The color palette must be restricted to deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and creamy off-white. Strong contrast is key, utilizing negative space effectively. The style should be inspired by Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e) but rendered with a modern, vector-art aesthetic. Central composition, perfect for apparel printing, with visible bleed area and crisp lines. Highly detailed, clean lines, graphic design, high contrast, stylized, repeating pattern, forest, stylized trees, modern vector illustration.
